name: Neal Caren
body:
**Neal Caren** - University of North Carolina, Chapel Hill
[mail](mailto:neal.caren@unc.edu)
[web](http://nealcaren.web.unc.edu)
[twitter](http://twitter.com/HaphazardSoc)
[scholar](http://scholar.google.com/citations?user=cy0u16kAAAAJ&hl=en)

**Learning Python for Social Scientists**
* [My big list of tutorials](http://nealcaren.github.io/python-tutorials/)

**Some of my stuff**
* Scraping Web Pages
    * [Grabbing lacrosse scores](http://nbviewer.ipython.org/url/www.unc.edu/~ncaren/Lax-1.ipynb.json)
* Using APIs
     * [Sushi Bars and Buffets: Measuring local culture with the Yelp API](http://nealcaren.github.io/sushi_bars.html)
* Word Frequencies
     * [How the New York Times writes about men and women]
(http://nbviewer.ipython.org/gist/nealcaren/5105037)
* [Generating field hockey power ratings](http://nbviewer.ipython.org/gist/nealcaren/6689516)

**Workshop Slides**

Slides from a workshop at the Center for Research on Inequalities and the Life Course (CIQLE), Yale University, 2014. [IPynb notebooks are also available](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/)  

1. [Introduction](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/1_into.slides.html)
1. [Reading code](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/2_Twitter.slides.html)
1. [Writing code](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/3_Sentiment.slides.html)
1. [Scraping](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/4_Upworthy.slides.html)
1. [APIs](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/5_Times_API.slides.html)
1. [Analysis](http://nealcaren.github.io/workshop_2014/6_Classification.slides.html)
